title: Just Be
excerpt: I have been having a bit of a love/hate relationship with Instagram recently for several reasons. Do you watch my InstaStories ? Apparently they can only be viewed on mobile. I love sharing all kinds of snippets there. They expire…
body:
I have been having a bit of a love/hate relationship with Instagram recently for several reasons. Do you watch my InstaStories? Apparently they can only be viewed on mobile. I love sharing all kinds of snippets there. They expire after 24 hours, and I did a little poll and got some good responses. I want to gather my thoughts a little more on the subject and then I will update you on any conclusions I've drawn. 

After I wrote this and posted it to Instagram I realized there are so many other P words I could use to add to it. Be proactive, present and polite would definitely be on the list. Can you think of others?
